## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Code refactor (structural improvement, no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Chore / Build configuration / Package updates

## How Has This Been Tested?

   - Visit `http://localhost:5173/`

2. Automated check status:
   - [ ] Running `npx tsc --noEmit` returns no errors
   - [ ] Running `npm run build` compiles successfully

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] My changes generate no new linting warnings or compiler errors
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have updated any relevant documentation
- [ ] My changes build and compile cleanly in production mode
